results.title: Volatile fractionation in early solar system and chondrule/matrix complementarity (PNAS)
results.judge_reason: Directly addresses chondrule-matrix complementarity and volatile fractionation, but is purely source-domain with no LLM analogy.

results.title: Origin of chondrules: Constraints from matrix composition and matrix-chondrule complementarity (EPSL)
results.judge_reason: Strong source-domain match on matrix-chondrule complementarity constraints; no pretraining/LLM bridge.

results.title: Imprint of chondrule formation on K/Rb isotopic compositions of carbonaceous meteorites (Sci Adv)
results.judge_reason: Related cosmochemistry of chondrule formation isotopics but does not name complementarity or fractional condensation cycles.

results.title: Mixture of Complementary Agents for Robust LLM Ensemble (NeurIPS 2025)
results.judge_reason: Uses 'complementary' in LLM ensemble context but not pretraining data cycles or chondrule-matrix framing.

results.title: Optimizing Pre-Training Data Mixtures (ACL 2025)
results.judge_reason: Optimizes pretraining data mixtures via weighted experts; lacks the fractional-condensation cyclic complementarity framing.

results.title: HetCCL: Accelerating LLM Training with Heterogeneous GPUs
results.judge_reason: Systems-level heterogeneous GPU training; unrelated to data complementarity or condensation cycles.

results.title: LLM Research Papers 2025 (Raschka)
results.judge_reason: Broad 2025 LLM survey including data mixtures, but no specific complementarity/condensation cycle proposal.

results.title: Reasoning Beyond Limits: Advances and Open Problems for LLMs
results.judge_reason: Reasoning survey unrelated to pretraining mixtures or chondrule-matrix complementarity.

summary.notes: Hits cover source-domain chondrule-matrix complementarity; no result combines fractional-condensation cycles with pretraining data mixtures, supporting novelty.
